records.system_name_en: Horse Racing Federation of Nigeria system
records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when HRFN populates a stable upcoming-events calendar with meeting dates and locations.
limitations: The official federation site identifies the national governing body, but its upcoming-events table did not provide reusable current meeting rows at review time.
Past results and race highlights are outside the public calendar dataset.
No current meeting fields are approved.
records.notes: Retain an official-link-first treatment until the official upcoming-events section is populated and reviewed.
